summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 7 features - all 5 new features working perfectly with 100% test success rate
passed_tests: Resend webhook endpoint processes events without secret (logs warning as expected)
Enhanced public stats with language distribution (FR/EN percentages for whitelist and chat)
Top 5 anonymized sessions with proper anon- prefixes and no PII leakage
Bulk blacklist CSV import with validation (imported: 2, invalid: 1, existing: 1)
JWT sessions management - multiple sessions creation and listing
Session revocation - specific session revocation works correctly
Revoke others functionality - revokes all sessions except current
JWT secret rotation - properly invalidates ALL sessions including caller's
Admin panel Sessions tab with management buttons visible
Bulk import UI components (file picker, textarea, submit) functional
Email status column with visual indicators (pending, sent, delivered)
Public stats language distribution bars showing FR/EN percentages
Privacy protection - no raw emails or session IDs in public stats
Basic whitelist and admin functionality still operational
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI components functional)
